results.description: THIS CONTRACT PROVIDES SERVICES FOR PURCHASING WAREHOUSING, TRACKING, AND SHIPPING PARTS/EQUIPMENT FOR SUPPORT OF THE ARMY WATERCRAFT SYSTEMS (AWS) REQUIREMENT. THIS IS THE 'LOGISTICS' CONTRACT THAT SUPPORTS THE "INSTALLATION/REPLACEMENT" CONTRACT.
